text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: manu

Log:
  MFC r361964:

  coufreq_dt: Rename DEBUG to DPRINTF

  DEBUG is a kernel configuration flag and if used cpufreq_dt.c will fail the
  build of kernel.

  PR:		246867
  Submitted by:	Oskar Holmund (oskar.holmlund@ohdata.se)
